bundle_name: Hot Racing SCX30 Brass Crawl Bundle
headline: SCX30 Brass Crawl Bundle
subheadline: More planted. More precise. Built for better crawling control.

parts.name: Brass Front Steering Block SCX30
parts.description_html:
Hot Racing brass Axles steering blocks (steering knuckles) for the Axial SCX30 axles. Add extra weight to your crawler where it needs it down low. Adds about 6.7g (0.27oz) to each steering knuckle.
FEATURES:
- CNC machined solid brass
- Add extra heavy weight to SCX30 for greater stability and lower CG
- Direct replacement for factory plastic steering knuckles
YOU WILL RECEIVE:
- Two (2) brass steering knuckles
- Four (4) King Pin Stainless Steel Bushing Screw
SPECIFICATIONS:
- weight 6.7g (0.27oz) each
REQUIREMENTS:
- Recommended to use a removable-type locking adhesive on screws threading into metal
COMMENTS:
- Replaces factory plastic Axial steering knuckles
- Not compatible with SXTY155H

parts.name: Brass TT Steering Fix Links SCX30
parts.description_html:
Hot Racing Brass tight tolerance steering Fix links for the Axial SCX30
FEATURES:
- The linkage set are much tighter than the stock steering linkage.
- CNC Brass Bar stock
- stainless Steel pivot balls
YOU WILL RECEIVE:
- One (1) Brass drag link
- One (1) drag link with Steel Pivot Ball
- Four (4) SS Pivot Ball
- Three (3) right-hand screw
REQUIREMENTS:
- Installation
COMMENTS:
- Replaces plastic steering link in Axial AXI3307

parts.name: 3.3g Brass Wheel Weights SCX30
parts.description_html:
Hot Racing wheel weights for the STOCK 0.7 in wheels AXI3313 on the Axial SCX30
FEATURES:
- CNC machined solid brass billet
- 3.3g each fitted to the wheels to lower the vehicles center of gravity, increase its stability, improve climbing, reduce the chance for flipping backwards, and make for an overall more capable crawler
- Friction fit to inside of Machete wheels. Some CA glue can be used to secure installation
YOU WILL RECEIVE:
- Four (4) 3.3g brass wheel weights
- Diameter of outer : 15.19mm
- Diameter of inside : 12.5mm
- Weight: 3.3g/ea
- width: 5mm
REQUIREMENTS:
- AXI SCX30 wheels
- CA glue can be used to secure weights to wheels
COMMENTS:
Designed for stock knuckle and hub set up!
Will NOT work with Hot Racing SXTY22H or Hot Racing SXTY21H.

parts.name: No Flex Brass Link Set SCX30
parts.description_html:
This is a Hot Racing No Flex optional upgrade Brass 4-link set for Axial SCX30 vehicles.
Add increase durability to your SCX30 with LWB by upgrading your stock plastic links with the Hot Racing brass link kit.
The links eliminates axle wrap and unwanted axle steer, especially in crawling applications.
FEATURES:
- Brass link for ultimate durability
- stainless Steel Ball
YOU WILL RECEIVE:
- Two (2) front lower links
- Two (2) upper links
- Two (2) rear High lower links
- Two (2) rear upper links
- Four (4) M1.4 X10 right-hand Screw
- Four (4) M1.4X8 right-hand Screw
- Eight (8) Ball with 1.4mm hole
- Twelve (12) Ball With 1mm hole
REQUIREMENTS:
- Installation
- Use all the M1 screw from SCX30
